commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the Feishu message-delivery tradeoff and proof gap.; Cleared: The diff only changes Feishu dispatcher logic and focused tests; it does not add dependencies, secrets handling, workflow code, package resolution, or new external execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Feishu reply dispatch so oversized final streaming replies bypass CardKit streaming, discard any active preview, and send through existing chunked post/static-card paths with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +107. Total +117 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current main routes every Feishu final reply into a streaming card when streaming is enabled, while textChunkLimit chunking only applies after the non-streaming/static send path is chosen. I did not reproduce the silent truncation against a live Feishu tenant in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the Feishu message-delivery tradeoff and proof gap.
